description: Create a draft email to accounting@example-firm.com with the subject 'March Invoices' and a brief message body. The email must include 'Invoice TS-9921 for Office Monitors', 'Cloud Hosting Invoice - March 2024', and 'Catering Invoice - Q1 All-Hands' from the Inbox forwarded together as attachments. For compliance reasons, ensure the original emails are attached as intact files rather than forwarded inline. Do not send the email.
